title: BytePort full integration — wire pheno-errors + pheno-tracing + pheno-config
author: forge
summary: Created the standalone crate BytePort/crates/integration/ with path dependencies to pheno-errors, pheno-tracing, and pheno-config. Implemented BytePortApp struct with a run() -> Result<(), AppError> method that initializes tracing and logs a startup span. BytePortApp::new(prefix) loads config via pheno-config::load_from_env, and BytePortApp::with_config(config) allows explicit construction for tests. All 2 tests pass (app_loads_config, app_initializes_tracing) and clippy is clean. Verified via cargo test --manifest-path crates/integration/Cargo.toml.

public_api.byteport_integration::BytePortConfig: struct { name: String, port: Option<u16> } — BytePort application configuration
public_api.byteport_integration::BytePortApp: struct { config: BytePortConfig } — canonical BytePort app entry point
public_api.byteport_integration::BytePortApp::new: fn(prefix: &str) -> Result<Self, AppError> — loads config from env via pheno-config
public_api.byteport_integration::BytePortApp::with_: fn(config: BytePortConfig) -> Self — explicit construction for testing
public_api.byteport_integration::BytePortApp::init_: fn(&self) — initializes pretty tracing via pheno-tracing::init
fn(&self) — initializes JSON tracing via pheno-tracing::init_json
fn(&self, dir: &Path) — initializes file tracing via pheno-tracing::init_with_file
public_api.byteport_integration::BytePortApp::run: fn(&self) -> Result<(), AppError> — initializes tracing and logs startup, returning Ok(())

test_coverage: BytePort/crates/integration/src/lib.rs: app_loads_config (line 77) — loads config via BPTEST_ prefix, asserts name and port
BytePort/crates/integration/src/lib.rs: app_initializes_tracing (line 86) — constructs app with explicit config and calls init_tracing without panic

verification.cargo_clippy: clean (no warnings) via cargo clippy --manifest-path crates/integration/Cargo.toml --all-targets

spec_alignment: The L5 #84 spec called for creating branch chore/l5-84-byteport-integration-2026-06-11, adding BytePort/crates/integration/Cargo.toml with path deps to pheno-errors, pheno-tracing, and pheno-config, implementing BytePortApp with run() -> Result<(), AppError>, tests app_loads_config and app_initializes_tracing, and verification via cargo test --manifest-path crates/integration/Cargo.toml. All deliverables are present verbatim.
spec_deviations: None. All spec deliverables are present and verified.
constraints_respected: Branch is local-only (chore/l5-84-byteport-integration-2026-06-11) and NOT pushed to origin per task directive.
The crate is a standalone package (explicit versions in Cargo.toml, workspace = true in Cargo.toml) but isolated under BytePort/crates/integration.
No touch of other crates or files beyond creating the integration crate.
Both canonical test names from the spec are present verbatim and pass.
cargo test --manifest-path crates/integration/Cargo.toml passes with 2/2 tests.
no_touch: Documentation files (no README.md created for the integration crate per task brevity directive)
